_comment: Example agent draft returned by POST /agent/*/draft and /agent/approvals/preview. Serious actions are pending_approval + requires_human_approval=true and only become final via POST /agent/approvals/execute with approved=true. See docs/agentic_cpu_inside_runpod.md.

preview.title: Object near table edge
preview.summary: Cup tracked moving toward the table edge over recent frames.

recommended_controls.action: Move the object away from the edge.
